onboarding.text2: or click the bars below Yukai:

settings.title: Settings
settings.voice_hint: ElevenLabs — best for English. Fish — natural Russian.
settings.sensitivity_hint: Fill = VAD speech probability. Drag the orange threshold — that's where "speech" starts. Applies instantly.
settings.language_hint: Changes the language Yukai responds in. Voice auto-adjusts.
settings.connection_hint: If the app fails to connect — try the RU mirror. Window reloads on change.
settings.devchat_hint: Tell me what broke, what's missing, what you liked

account.title: Account
account.notSignedIn: Not signed in — Yukai can't respond

empty.hint: Say to Yukai: "let's study English" or "let's practice" — learned words will appear here

bottom.hint: Say "let's practice" — Yukai will show new words in guess mode

music.title: Song history
music.name: Music recognition
music.desc: Shazam-style: hold Left Alt + ` for Yukai to identify what's playing

dictation.title: Dictation history
dictation.name: Dictation
dictation.desc: Hold Right Alt and speak — text is transcribed and pasted into the active field

english.title: English history
english.name: English learning
english.desc: Flashcards with SRS spaced repetition. [img: word] → image + Yukai asks.

screenshot.title: Screenshots + vision
screenshot.name: Screenshot + vision
screenshot.desc: Screen capture → Claude describes what it sees. Say "what's on screen", "select region", "what anime is this".

music.empty: Hold Alt+` to identify the playing song

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.empty: Hold Right Alt and speak — text gets pasted and saved here

empty.hint: Click "+ full" or say "what's on screen?" / "select region and tell me what it is"

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue chatting with Yukai

register.title: Let's meet
register.subtitle: Create an account in a minute and start chatting with Yukai
register.errorLoginAfter: Account created but auto-login failed — try the sign in page

landing.betaBanner: Beta is open — join our Telegram to chat with the dev →
landing.heroSubtitle: Yukai talks back, dictates your messages, Shazams music from any app, and is always right there. Not just an assistant — a partner with personality.
landing.betaNote: Free during beta · macOS and Linux coming soon
landing.yukaiBubbleText: Hey, ready to help today. What should we do first — check your email or listen to some music?
landing.featuresSubtitle: Three main features — each replaces a separate app. All in one Yukai.
landing.feature1Desc: Speaks with voice, reacts with emotions. Remembers what you discussed. Work and life feel less boring.
landing.feature2Desc: Hold Right Alt, speak, release — text appears in any window. Like Wispr Flow but with personality.
landing.feature3Desc: Song playing in YouTube or a game? Alt+` — Yukai hears it through system audio and tells you the name.
landing.howSubtitle: Yukai is a transparent window above all programs. You see her, but she doesn't get in the way.
landing.step1Desc: Download .exe, open it — Yukai appears in the corner of your screen.
landing.step2Desc: Choose voice, emotions. Later — custom characters from creators.
landing.step3Desc: Work, play, watch YouTube. Yukai is always there, answers when needed.
landing.pricingSubtitle: No hidden limits. No throttling. Cancel anytime.
landing.pricingNote: Free during beta. Subscription — when v1 ships.
landing.faq1q: What systems does it work on?
landing.faq1a: Windows 10/11 — now. macOS and Linux — in development. Minimum: 4 GB RAM, microphone.
landing.faq2a: Yes, voice and Yukai's brain run in the cloud (Claude AI + Fish Audio). Regular home internet handles it.
landing.faq3q: How many languages does she know?
landing.faq3a: Russian and English — fully. Others — understood, but voice is RU/EN only for now.
landing.faq4q: Can I change voice or appearance?
landing.faq4a: Basic — free. Marketplace with voices and characters from creators (including anime artists and seiyuu) coming soon.
landing.faq5q: What does Yukai do with my data?
landing.faq5a: Conversations are not stored on servers longer than processing. Local memory stays only on your computer.
landing.faq6q: What if I cancel my subscription?
landing.faq6a: Access stays until the end of the paid period. Local memory and settings remain with you.
landing.finalTitle2: Then — like with an old friend.
landing.finalSubtitle: Beta is free now. No cards, no spam.
